name: ICED TURMERIC MILKSHAKE
intro: This iced turmeric milkshake transforms your haldiwala doodh into a gentle cold drink filled with the goodness of desi kitchen staples.
method: In a blender, combine the almond milk with the fresh turmeric, turmeric powder, sugar, cinnamon powder, dry ginger powder and salt.
Blend it well. Strain and pour it over ice cubes.
